candidates.title: Overlap Trend Retest Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Trade overlap-session continuation only after an established move retests without breaking trend structure, aiming for a longer directional follow-through than the retired scalping family. Corpus anchor: SRC-003: Always remember Wyckoff's second law, the law of cause and effect. If the cause is large, then this will be reflected in the effect, which applies to support and resistance.
